brief_html: Pickup an item from a Body Location to you're cursor buffer.
remarks_html:
Pickup an item from a Body Location to you're cursor buffer.

Possible Body Locations:
0x01 - Helm
0x02 - Amulet
0x03 - Armor
0x04 - Left-hand weapon
0x05 - Right-hand weapon
0x06 - Left-hand ring
0x07 - Right-hand ring
0x08 - Belt
0x09 - Boots
0x0A - Gloves
